moments.title: The Open Championship Final Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concludes today at Royal Birkdale, with American Sam Burns leading the field into the final round.

angles.name: Final Day Drama
angles.copy: It all comes down to today! Who will lift the Claret Jug at Royal Birkdale? The final round of The Open Championship is underway.

angles.name: Sam Burns Lead
angles.copy: American Sam Burns is leading The Open Championship into the final round. Can he hold his nerve and secure the major title?

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Year
moments.blurb: Nottingham's much-loved Splendour Festival concludes today at Wollaton Hall, marking its final ever event after 18 years.

angles.name: Farewell Splendour
angles.copy: It's the bittersweet final day of Splendour Festival at Wollaton Hall. Let's make some noise for one last hurrah!

angles.name: Festival Memories
angles.copy: Eighteen years of incredible music and memories. What's your favourite Splendour Festival moment as it closes its doors today?

moments.title: Latest UK Singles Chart Shake-Up
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart for the week ending July 23, 2026, sees Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold strong at #1, while World Cup fever sends classics soaring.

angles.name: #1 Still
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still holding strong at Number 1 in the Official UK Singles Chart! Reigning supreme with 'Rein Me In'.

angles.name: World Cup Chart Impact
angles.copy: World Cup fever has hit the charts! Oasis' 'Wonderwall' is at #2 and 'Three Lions' at #3 this week. Football's coming home... to the charts!

angles.name: Shakira & Burna Boy Entry
angles.copy: New entry alert! Shakira & Burna Boy's World Cup anthem 'Dai Dai' makes a big splash at #5 in the Official Singles Chart. What a track!

moments.title: The Hundred Cricket Tournament Begins
moments.blurb: The Hundred, the 100-ball cricket tournament, kicks off its 2026 season on Tuesday, July 21, with MI London facing Sunrisers Leeds at the Kia Oval.

angles.name: Cricket Season Starts
angles.copy: Get ready! The Hundred is back this Tuesday! The fast-paced cricket tournament returns with MI London vs Sunrisers Leeds.

angles.name: Welsh Fire Action
angles.copy: Welsh Fire are in action this week in The Hundred! Catch them on Wednesday as they take on Southern Brave. Who's cheering them on?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary, returning to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, with a diverse lineup of music, arts, and comedy.

angles.name: Latitude at 20
angles.copy: Happy 20th Anniversary, Latitude! The festival kicks off this Thursday in Henham Park. Who are you most excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Lineup
angles.copy: From music to comedy, theatre to podcasts – Latitude Festival is back this week with a packed lineup. Get your wellies ready!

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Friday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Jagger at 83
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger this Friday! Still got the moves like Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: From Dartford to global icon, Mick Jagger turns 83 on Friday! A true rock and roll legend.

moments.title: Roger Taylor (Queen) 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's drummer, Roger Taylor, will celebrate his 77th birthday on Friday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Friday! What's your top Queen song?

moments.title: Stormzy's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: British grime superstar Stormzy celebrates his 33rd birthday on Friday, July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Big Mike's Birthday
angles.copy: Massive Happy 33rd Birthday to the one and only Stormzy this Friday! What's your favourite track from Big Mike?

moments.title: Selena Gomez's 34th Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Tuesday, July 22, 2026.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Selena
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 34th Birthday to the incredible Selena Gomez this Tuesday! What's your favourite Selena song or movie?

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses legendary guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday on Wednesday, July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash this Wednesday! That top hat and incredible guitar work are truly iconic. What's your favourite GNR solo?

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20, 2026.

angles.name: Santana at 79
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the maestro, Carlos Santana, tomorrow! His guitar riffs are timeless. What's your go-to Santana track?

moments.title: Martin Gore (Depeche Mode) 65th Birthday
moments.blurb: Depeche Mode's co-founder and songwriter, Martin Gore, celebrates his 65th birthday on Wednesday, July 23, 2026.

angles.name: Depeche Mode Genius
angles.copy: A huge Happy 65th Birthday to Martin Gore of Depeche Mode this Wednesday! The songwriting genius behind so many classics.

moments.title: UK Summer Weather Outlook
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing warmer than average temperatures this July, with forecasts predicting continued warm spells, particularly in the south, but also a chance of changeable conditions and thunderstorms.

angles.name: Summer Heat & Showers
angles.copy: It's a classic British summer mix! Warm temperatures are here, but keep an eye out for those sudden showers. Don't forget the brolly AND the suncream!

angles.name: Warm Week Ahead
angles.copy: Looks like another warm week ahead for much of the UK, especially in the south. Perfect for soaking up some rays (when the clouds allow!).

moments.title: Depot In The Castle Festival
moments.blurb: Depot In The Castle takes place on Saturday, July 25, 2026, within the grounds of Cardiff Castle, bringing a day of live music to the Welsh capital.

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Gigs
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is hosting Depot In The Castle this Saturday! Who's heading to the capital for a day of live music?
